domains.name: Customer Care
domains.description: Customer care services focus on improving user satisfaction through responsive support, automated assistance, and intelligent issue resolution systems.

services.name: Voice Bot Support
services.description: AI-powered voice assistants that handle customer calls and provide automated support through natural speech interaction.

use_cases.title: Automated Call Center Handling
use_cases.problem: Customer support teams struggle with high call volumes during peak hours.
use_cases.solution: Deploy voice bots capable of answering common questions and routing complex issues to human agents.
use_cases.impact: Reduced call waiting times and improved service efficiency.

use_cases.title: Appointment Scheduling via Voice
use_cases.problem: Customers often need assistance booking appointments through support lines.
use_cases.solution: Voice assistants integrated with scheduling systems allow users to book or modify appointments.
use_cases.impact: Improved booking convenience and reduced manual scheduling workload.

services.name: Customer Self-Service Portal
services.description: Interactive customer portals that allow users to manage requests, access knowledge bases, and resolve issues independently.

use_cases.title: Knowledge Base Assistance
use_cases.problem: Customers cannot easily find answers to common questions.
use_cases.solution: Implement searchable knowledge bases powered by AI recommendations.
use_cases.impact: Reduced support tickets and empowered customers with self-service tools.

use_cases.title: Account Issue Resolution
use_cases.problem: Users need assistance resetting passwords or updating account settings.
use_cases.solution: Provide automated workflows and guided troubleshooting steps.
use_cases.impact: Reduced dependency on human agents and faster issue resolution.

domains.name: Data Analytics
domains.description: Data analytics services transform raw organizational data into actionable insights for decision-making and strategic planning.

services.name: Business Intelligence Dashboards
services.description: Interactive dashboards that visualize business performance metrics and operational insights.

use_cases.title: Sales Performance Monitoring
use_cases.problem: Executives lack real-time visibility into regional sales performance.
use_cases.solution: Develop dashboards integrating CRM and transaction data with visual analytics.
use_cases.impact: Enabled faster strategic decisions and improved sales forecasting accuracy.

services.name: Predictive Analytics
services.description: Machine learning models that forecast trends, detect anomalies, and predict outcomes based on historical data.

use_cases.title: Customer Churn Prediction
use_cases.problem: Companies struggle to identify customers likely to leave their services.
use_cases.solution: Apply predictive models using behavioral and transaction data.
use_cases.impact: Enabled proactive retention strategies and reduced churn rates.

domains.name: Cloud Services
domains.description: Cloud services enable scalable, reliable, and secure infrastructure for modern digital applications.

services.name: Cloud Migration
services.description: Moving on-premise applications and systems to cloud infrastructure for improved scalability and reliability.

use_cases.title: Legacy System Migration
use_cases.problem: Legacy systems running on outdated hardware limit scalability and increase maintenance costs.
use_cases.solution: Migrate applications to containerized cloud environments.
use_cases.impact: Improved system reliability and reduced infrastructure costs.

services.name: DevOps Automation
services.description: CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation that accelerate software delivery.

use_cases.title: Continuous Deployment Pipeline
use_cases.problem: Manual deployment processes slow down feature releases.
use_cases.solution: Implement CI/CD pipelines with automated testing and container deployment.
use_cases.impact: Reduced deployment time and improved release reliability.

domains.name: Cyber Security
domains.description: Cyber security services protect digital systems, networks, and data from unauthorized access, attacks, and vulnerabilities.

services.name: Threat Monitoring
services.description: Continuous monitoring of network activity to detect and respond to potential security threats.

use_cases.title: Real-Time Intrusion Detection
use_cases.problem: Organizations struggle to detect malicious activity in large network environments.
use_cases.solution: Deploy intrusion detection systems combined with AI-based anomaly detection.
use_cases.impact: Early detection of cyber threats and reduced potential security breaches.

services.name: Data Protection & Encryption
services.description: Security mechanisms that ensure sensitive information remains protected both in transit and at rest.

use_cases.title: Secure Customer Data Storage
use_cases.problem: Sensitive customer data is vulnerable to unauthorized access.
use_cases.solution: Implement encryption, role-based access controls, and secure key management.
use_cases.impact: Improved compliance with data protection regulations and enhanced user trust.

domains.name: AI Automation
domains.description: AI automation solutions streamline business processes by combining artificial intelligence with workflow automation.

services.name: Intelligent Document Processing
services.description: AI systems that extract, classify, and process data from documents such as invoices, forms, and contracts.

use_cases.title: Invoice Processing Automation
use_cases.problem: Manual invoice processing is slow and error-prone.
use_cases.solution: Use OCR and machine learning models to extract invoice data and automatically update accounting systems.
use_cases.impact: Reduced processing time and minimized human errors.

services.name: Business Workflow Automation
services.description: Automated workflows that streamline repetitive business operations.

use_cases.title: Employee Onboarding Automation
use_cases.problem: HR teams manually handle multiple onboarding tasks.
use_cases.solution: Automate account creation, document submission, and training assignments through workflow systems.
use_cases.impact: Faster onboarding and reduced administrative workload.
